productDisplayName: Crocs Kids Band Club Purple Floater
description: These clogs from crocs are the perfect blend of comfort and style. Jump around in them at the park, lounge in them at home, or take a walk on the beach in these youthful clogs... perfect for all situations, and look fab with all your casual clothes.Upper Fully moulded Croslite upper with a closed toe deisgn for  style, durability and comfort Holes on the forefoot for increased ventilation and jibbitz shoe charms Heel-hugging back strap for fashionable comfort Brand badge on forefoot Brand name embossed on strap and heel Brand tab on sides of both straps Midsole Croslite footbed with circulation nubs for a massage-like feel Brand logo embossed on footbed Outsole Non-marking, slip-resistant Croslite outsole Multi-directional textured leaf-shaped grooves in the forefoot and backfoot for ample grip, stability and comfort Shoe careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
